title: deutzia pulchra
intro: Deutzia pulchra, a flowering plant species in the hydrangea family, is native to China and is also known as the beautiful or fragrant deutzia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Deutzia pulchra is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its flowers and leaves can be used separately or in combination to create medicinal remedies.
